title: ProDec 9 inch 100% Recycled Plastic Paint Roller Tray With Textured Anti-Skid Grip, Ideal For Trade & DIY Rollers Up To 9" Wide and All Types Of Paint, Varnish, Woodstain (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Plastic paint tray for paint rollers up to 9" (225mm) wide that holds approx. 1 litre of paint
Robust, stable construction made from 100% recycled plastic
Ribbed shoreline enables roller to grip for even paint loading
Can be used with all types of paint, varnish, lacquer and wood treatments
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint This paint tray is made from 100% recycled plastic and is easy to wash out, enabling it to be re-used again and again instead of being disposed of. Suitable for paints, varnishes, lacquers or wood treatments, it features a robust, stable construction with a low centre of gravity so it won't tip over and spill even with rapid roller loading. The shoreline features a ribbed profile designed to provide rollers with grip so you can easily roll them out without skidding when loading up. This is important as it ensures even distribution across the roller which in turn means the paint isn't dumped on the surface you're painting and requires less working out, improving your painting efficiency. ProDec paint trays are available in the following sizes: Mini rollers up to 4" (100mm) wide - holds up to 250ml Rollers up to 7" (175mm) wide - holds up to 350ml Rollers up to 9" (225mm) wide - holds up to 1 litre Rollers up to 11" (275mm) wide - holds up to 2.5 litres Rollers up to 15" (375mm) wide - holds up to 4 litres SOLUTIONS FROM PRODEC - whether it's to load up a roller, thin down trade paint or mix filler or paste, ProDec has the right products for you to decant paint and other products from the container. Paint kettles ProDec's robust paint kettles are suitable for decanting paint from larger cans or buckets, thinning down smaller amounts of paint, and mixing powder fillers and wallpaper adhesive. Featuring a sturdy metal carry handle, they are also more convenient than holding small paint tins that don't have a handle - particularly gloss and satin paints. The handle is also ideal for use with a swivel pot hook that attaches to ladders and scaffolding, giving you a free hand to work safely at height. Available in 1L, 2.5L and 5L capacities. Paint trays ProDec trays feature a low centre of gravity so they won't tip over and spill paint even with rapid roller loading. The shoreline features a ribbed profile designed to provide rollers with grip so you can easily roll them out without skidding when loading up with paint. Available in 4" mini, 7", 9", 11" and 15" roller sizes. Paint scuttles A favourite with trade professionals, scuttles hold much more paint than trays, meaning that you need to reload them less regularly, enabling you to work more quickly and efficiently. ProDec scuttles are available in 2.5L, 5L, 10L, 15L and 25L capacities. PRODEC: THE COMPLETE DECORATING SOLUTION - ProDec has all the tools you need for a trade quality job, from preparation and protection through to application and cleaning up. Brushes Whatever the paint or surface, ProDec has a brush for every situation. From flat brushes to angled brushes, long reach brushes to fine detail brushes, masonry brushes to block brushes, papering brushes to dusting brushes, we've got everything you need for a smooth trade finish. Rollers Cage rollers, mini rollers, padded rollers and double arm rollers are available in a wide range of trade quality fabrics that suit emulsion, masonry, gloss, satin, primer, undercoat, woodstains and more. Rugged frames and sturdy extension poles help you paint quickly and effectively. Tools From scraping to filling, smoothing to caulking, cutting to pasting and much more, ProDec has the tools to help you prepare surfaces before painting for a long lasting finish, and get outstanding results with wallpaper. Tapes ProDec's range of quality masking tapes protect surfaces and give crisp paint lines for a high quality finish, saving time and mess. Standard grades are available for everyday use, low tack grades for delicate surfaces and UV resistant grades for hotspots. Dust Sheets & Tarpaulins Our range of cotton and polythene dust sheets, self-adhesive films and barrier sheets keeps floors and furniture protected from spills and splashes during the job and helps minimise dust transfer between working areas. Abrasives Good painting starts with good preparation, and ProDec has everything you need to get your surfaces in tiptop condition. We've got a range of trade quality abrasive papers for sanding, steel wool and wire brushes for cleaning, as well as tack cloths to remove dust. Maintenance Whatever the job, ProDec has all the essentials you need, from wiping to polishing, sweeping up to collecting waste. Our range includes cloths, rags, sponges, brooms, rubble sacks, paint kettles and more. Painters' Workwear ProDec has a wide range of professional decorating workwear, including painters' trousers, shorts and the classic bib & brace. Available in a choice of hardwearing fabrics, they are carefully designed and tailored for a comfortable fit, with multiple storage pockets to keep essential tools close at hand.
